rawAdvertText:
Operations Manager - job post
SGS Care Ltd
Stafford ST17 4HR•Remote
From £60,000 a year - Full-time
Job details
Here’s how the job details align with your profile.

Pay


From £60,000 a year


Job type


Full-time

 
Full job description
Job Title: Operations Manager
Location: Staffordshire

Salary: From £60,000 per annum
Employment Type: Permanent

Service: Children’s Residential Services
Service Users: Children and Young People within regulated residential settings

Qualifications Required: Must have Family Assessment Centre experience (essential)
Experience Required: Experience managing residential services and Registered Managers, ideally across multiple sites; experience engaging and motivating staff (including remotely)

The Home:
Oversight of two regulated children’s services, ensuring full compliance with statutory requirements and organisational policies.

Number of homes: 6 services

Who we are looking for:
Our client is seeking an experienced Operations Manager who will also act as the Ofsted Registered Responsible Individual for two services. You will provide strategic leadership, ensure regulatory compliance, and drive high standards of care and safeguarding.

Key responsibilities include:

Acting as the Ofsted Registered Responsible Individual
Ensuring compliance with Children’s Homes Regulations 2015 (including Quality Standards) and Regulation 44 inspections
Ensuring homes operate in line with their Statement of Purpose
Preparing managers for Ofsted inspections
Providing formal and informal supervision to Registered Managers
Identifying and supporting professional development and training needs
Ensuring effective safeguarding of young people
Promoting high standards of professional practice
Overseeing performance management and development plans
Ensuring electronic administration systems are accurate and up to date
Promoting health and safety across services
Supporting recruitment, induction, disciplinary, capability and grievance processes
Supporting managers in maintaining home vehicles in line with policy
Participating in meetings, projects and organisational initiatives
You will be a strategic thinker with the ability to prioritise effectively, manage your own workload, and reflect constructively on practice. Strong communication skills and the ability to build professional networks are essential.

Desirable:
Experience managing Learning Disability homes
Experience developing and managing projects
Experience facilitating group supervision approaches
Who you will be working for:
Our client is a professional organisation committed to delivering high-quality residential care and maintaining strong regulatory compliance.

Why this home & company:
Senior leadership opportunity with Responsible Individual status
Strategic influence across multiple services
Opportunity to shape service development and standards
Ethos:
A strong commitment to safeguarding, professional standards, equality of opportunity, and continuous improvement in service delivery.

Sponsorship is not available.

How to apply:
If you are passionate about making a difference in the lives of children and young people and would like to join our client’s dedicated team, apply today.
To apply, click the apply button or contact us for more information.

For more information or to book a confidential chat, please contact: job@sgscare.co.uk
shortCompanyReason: Professional residential care organisation with strong regulatory focus.
shortRoleReason: Senior operations role overseeing regulated children’s services and Responsible Individual duties.
companySummary: SGS Care Ltd is a professional organisation delivering high-quality residential care with a strong commitment to regulatory compliance, safeguarding, and continuous improvement.
roleSummary: The Operations Manager will oversee two regulated children’s services, act as the Ofsted Registered Responsible Individual, and provide strategic leadership, compliance oversight, and support to Registered Managers.
headlineAttraction: Senior leadership role with Responsible Individual status and strategic influence across multiple services.
rolePurpose: To provide strategic leadership and regulatory oversight across regulated children’s services while ensuring high standards of care, safeguarding, and compliance.
advertSummary: Senior Operations Manager role in children’s residential services, based in Staffordshire and remote, offering from £60,000 per year. The post covers oversight of six services, regulatory compliance, safeguarding, staff leadership, and Ofsted-related responsibilities. Family Assessment Centre experience is essential.
personalisedIntro: I’m looking at this role because it sits right where I do my best work: regulated services, operational oversight, and practical leadership that improves day-to-day delivery. My background is in taking complex services, putting better control around them, and making performance easier to manage without losing sight of the people using the service.
whyThisRole: This role fits the kind of work I’ve built my career around: setting direction, keeping standards visible, and supporting managers to perform well in demanding settings. I’d be comfortable with the mix of strategic oversight, inspection readiness, supervision, and the practical follow-through that keeps regulated services steady.
companyPridePoints: Opportunity to shape service development and standards
coreResponsibilities: Act as the Ofsted Registered Responsible Individual
Ensure compliance with Children’s Homes Regulations 2015 and Quality Standards
Ensure homes operate in line with their Statement of Purpose
Oversee performance management and development plans
Promote health and safety across services
Support recruitment, induction, disciplinary, capability and grievance processes
Participate in meetings, projects and organisational initiatives
essentialRequirements: Experience engaging and motivating staff remotely
Ability to reflect constructively on practice
impliedStrategicGoals: Drive high standards across multiple services

personalisedContent.heroPositioning: I bring calm control to regulated services that need tighter standards and clearer accountability.
personalisedContent.personalisedOpening: I’m looking at this role because it sits right where I do my best work: regulated services, operational oversight, and practical leadership that improves day-to-day delivery. My background is in taking complex services, putting better control around them, and making performance easier to manage without losing sight of the people using the service.
personalisedContent.whyThisCompany: SGS Care Ltd stands out to me because the brief is clear about what matters: safeguarding, compliance, professional standards, and continuous improvement. I also value the fact that this is a senior role with real influence across multiple services, rather than a narrow management post.
personalisedContent.whyThisRole: This role fits the kind of work I’ve built my career around: setting direction, keeping standards visible, and supporting managers to perform well in demanding settings. I’d be comfortable with the mix of strategic oversight, inspection readiness, supervision, and the practical follow-through that keeps regulated services steady.

selectedEvidenceExamples.whyChosen: I used better operational grip to improve a live patient-facing service, and that is the closest match I have to turning around service experience in a regulated setting.
selectedEvidenceExamples.suggestedUsage: Use as the strongest proof of improving standards and follow-through in a live service environment.
selectedEvidenceExamples.shortLine: I improved Google reviews from 2.09 to 4.51 by tightening follow-through in a pressured NHS service.

selectedEvidenceExamples.exampleTitle: Ride compliance and operator progression tracking
selectedEvidenceExamples.bestMatchedRoleNeed: compliance oversight and safe operating practice
selectedEvidenceExamples.whyChosen: I created a practical compliance-tracking system in a safety-critical operation, which shows I’m comfortable making standards easier to monitor and manage.
selectedEvidenceExamples.suggestedUsage: Use as supporting evidence for compliance mindset and practical systems thinking.
selectedEvidenceExamples.shortLine: I built a tracking system to help manage compliance and progression safely in a live operation.

selectedEvidenceExamples.exampleTitle: Complex annual projects and team leadership
selectedEvidenceExamples.whyChosen: I’ve led and supported a team through demanding annual work while keeping service standards in place, which maps well to managing managers and distributed teams.
selectedEvidenceExamples.suggestedUsage: Use as evidence for supervision, prioritisation, and keeping performance steady under pressure.
selectedEvidenceExamples.shortLine: I managed a 12-person function through business-critical work without losing control of service delivery.

personalisedContent.roleNeedsSummary: I read this as a role that needs someone who can hold the line on compliance while also helping managers do their jobs well. It seems to need steady judgement, clear communication, and the ability to keep multiple services aligned without creating noise or bureaucracy.

experienceMappings.myEvidence: I created a user input system to monitor and track operating hours for compliance and operator progression in a safety-critical environment.
experienceMappings.relevance: That shows I can make compliance visible and manageable in a live operation.

experienceMappings.roleNeed: Improving service standards and inspection readiness
experienceMappings.myEvidence: In NHS primary care, I improved patient experience and strengthened follow-through in a live regulated service.
experienceMappings.relevance: That is relevant because the role needs someone who can raise standards in practice, not just on paper.

experienceMappings.myEvidence: I coordinated workload allocation and training across a 12-person function while maintaining service standards and processing performance.
experienceMappings.relevance: That gives me a solid base for supporting managers, setting expectations, and keeping delivery organised.

experienceMappings.roleNeed: Prioritising and managing my own workload
experienceMappings.myEvidence: I led day-to-day operations through a scale-up phase where production, people, systems, and customer requirements all needed close control.
experienceMappings.relevance: This role will need someone who can stay organised across several demands at once.

experienceMappings.roleNeed: Working remotely with staff and managers
experienceMappings.myEvidence: I’ve supported a team through complex annual work in a structured environment where clear communication and coordination mattered.
experienceMappings.relevance: That aligns with the need to engage and motivate staff remotely.

focusAreasToBring.title: Compliance that people can use
focusAreasToBring.summary: I would focus on making standards practical for managers, so compliance is easier to evidence, monitor, and sustain.

focusAreasToBring.title: Clear support for Registered Managers
focusAreasToBring.summary: I would keep supervision, expectations, and follow-up straightforward so managers know where they stand and what good looks like.

focusAreasToBring.title: Inspection readiness through routine discipline
focusAreasToBring.summary: I would look for simple, reliable ways to keep records, actions, and performance visible before they become inspection issues.

personalisedContent.fitSummary: My background fits this role because I’ve worked in regulated, service-led environments where standards, control, and follow-through matter. I bring a mix of operational discipline and people leadership, and I’m used to improving performance without losing sight of day-to-day delivery.
personalisedContent.likelyContributionSummary: Based on what the brief describes, I would expect to spend the first months getting close to the services, understanding how each manager is operating, and checking where compliance or practice gaps may exist. I’d also want to tighten reporting, supervision, and action tracking so the homes are easier to support and easier to inspect.
companyHighlights: Professional organisation delivering high-quality residential care
Strong commitment to regulatory compliance, safeguarding, and continuous improvement
Senior leadership role with Responsible Individual status across multiple services
personalisedContent.cultureFitSummary: I work best in environments where standards matter and people want practical improvement rather than noise. The emphasis on safeguarding, professional practice, and continuous improvement feels aligned with how I like to lead.

first90DaysPlan.detail: I would get close to the managers, review current compliance position, understand each service’s pressures, and build a clear picture of what is working well and what needs attention.
I would focus on supervision, performance visibility, and the quality of records and action tracking, so I can support managers with clear priorities and fewer surprises.
I would look to strengthen consistency across services, check inspection readiness, and make sure safeguarding, reporting, and development plans are being followed through properly.

personalisedContent.closingSummary: I would bring steady leadership, practical control, and a clear focus on standards to a role that needs all three.
closingProofPoints: I improved patient experience from 2.09 to 4.51 in NHS primary care.
I built a compliance-tracking system in a safety-critical operation.
I supported a 12-person function through demanding annual work while keeping service standards in place.
contentNotes: I have not claimed direct Family Assessment Centre experience because it is not shown in the CV or evidence bank.
I have not referenced Ofsted-specific delivery from past roles because that is not evidenced directly; I have instead used regulated-environment examples that support the same capability areas.
The evidence bank is stronger on regulated operations, compliance, and service improvement than on children’s residential services specifically, so I have kept the fit case grounded and selective.

examples.title: “Built live operational dashboard concept for GP practice visibility”
